user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new FMLA qualifying reason, so that employees can select valid reasons when requesting FMLA leave.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the FMLA Qualifying Reasons screen; When I click Add new qualifying reason and enter FMLA type and reason; Then the qualifying reason is saved and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view qualifying reasons by FMLA type and reason, so that I can review the configured FMLA reasons.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the FMLA Qualifying Reasons screen; When the list loads; Then I see the FMLA type(s) and Reason columns

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the qualifying reasons list, so that I see the latest entries after changes.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the FMLA Qualifying Reasons screen; When I click refresh; Then the list reloads with current reasons

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to see an empty state when no qualifying reasons exist, so that I know to configure them.
acceptance_criteria: Given no qualifying reasons are configured; When the list loads; Then it shows "No records to display"
